name: ds-blocks/explore-highlights
title: DST Explore Highlights
description: Two-column 'why choose us' section: heading + subtitle + a feature list card on the left, and an asymmetric image grid with a skyline decoration on the right.

default.title: Why Millions Choose to Explore the India
default.subtitle: A land of timeless heritage, breakthrough landscapes and unforgettable experiences.

default.title: Timeless Heritage & History
default.description: Walk through centuries of history, from magnificent forts and palaces to iconic landmarks that tell the story of a civilization unlike any other.

default.title: Breathtaking Natural Wonders
default.description: From the snow-capped Himalayas and serene backwaters to golden deserts and tropical beaches, India offers landscapes for every kind of traveler.

default.title: Incredible Value & Warm Hospitality
default.description: Enjoy world-class experiences, delicious cuisine, and heartfelt hospitality while exploring one of the most affordable and welcoming destinations on Earth.
